text:
BOTTOM LINE — Tech-led grind higher, earnings dispersion key. QQQ outpaced SPY by 0.68pp on Alphabet/Oracle strength, countered by Meta/Microsoft AI spend fears and energy slide. Risk-on flows into software/cloud amid oil retreat signaled rotation from defensives.

INDICES — VIX 17.0 down from 19.2 MA20. QQQ +0.96%, SPY +0.28%, IWM +0.47%, DIA -0.33%. Large > small by 0.49pp. Oil USO -2.92% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated vol in RSP 1.6x, DIA 1.0x, XLC 1.8x, XLY 1.6x gaining attention; SPY 0.7x, QQQ vol_ratio low, XLE 0.8x, XLU 0.8x ignored. SPY vol down + price up signals low-conviction rally, QQQ vol_ratio implicit low amid price gain = accumulation hints. Sectors like XLI 0.7x vol down despite CAT surge = distribution watch.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +1.49%, XLY Discretionary +0.24%, XLC Comms +0.18%, XLP Staples -0.17%, XLRE Real Estate -0.18%, XLB Materials -0.23%, XLF Financials -0.40%, XLV Healthcare -0.57%, XLU Utilities -0.64%, XLI Industrials -0.93%, XLE Energy -1.34%. Top industries WCLD +6.38%, IGV +3.24%; bottom USO -2.92%, MSOS -1.37%.

THE 7s — Top5: Software +2.89% (ORCL strongest, NET weakest), Cloud +2.24%, Mag7 +1.09%, Semi +0.85%, Insurance +0.59% (AIG strongest). Bot5: Medtech -2.17% (SYK weakest), Old Metals -2.15%, Housing -1.67%, Industrial -1.51% (PH weakest), Freight -1.38%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Stance Hawk6 (Cook et al), Neutral5 (Powell et al), Dove4 (Bowman et al). USD stress 64/100 Elevated, CP-Tbill 96th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.17 elevated protection, skew +4.4% put fear; spot 7220 below GEX_flip 725 CTA sell risk. QQQ PCR_vol 2.38 high fear, skew +3.8%. VIX 17.0 below MA20=19.2 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -2.92% aided equities relief, silver SLV +2.45% decoupled from gold -0.11%. Dollar UUP +0.18% minor pressure on GLD.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 63.7 Greed. Top movers QCOM +15.1% tech, CAT +9.9% industrials, LLY +9.8% healthcare. 20d mom: XLK best sector +19.03%, Semi7 best basket +49.59%; XLV worst sector -1.12%, Medtech7 worst -7.64%. Vol spikes RSPR 20.6x +0.21% EW sectors accumulation.

WATCH — AIG +5.31% insurance vol 2.2x spike. SYK -6.47% medtech vol 2.1x distribution post-earnings miss. RSPR +0.21% 20.6x vol equal-weight sectors divergence.
